free_text: Polarization in the elastic scattering of neutrons from
Incident energy interval at least 200 keV.
detectors placed in either of 2 angular orientations.
Discrimination levels set to reject neutrons with
energies more than 400 keV below primary neutron
. flux attenuation in the scattering sample
. efficiency correction resulting from energy loss
Updated to new date formats, lower case.
